name: 样例1
description: 案例1：通过语义识别账号、密码、运营商和登录按钮，减少对选择器的依赖（不能直接使用，请自行修改）

steps.script: (() => { const username = String('{{username}}' || '').trim(); if (!username) throw new Error('账号为空'); const visible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 2 && rect.height > 2; }; const editable = (el) => el && !el.disabled && !el.readOnly; const textOf = (el) => [el.placeholder, el.getAttribute('aria-label'), el.name, el.id, el.className].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const score = (el) => { let s = 0; const type = String(el.type || '').toLowerCase(); if (type === 'text' || type === 'email' || type === 'tel' || type === '') s += 5; if (type === 'password' || type === 'hidden') s -= 20; const t = textOf(el); if (/账号|帐号|用户名|学号|工号|手机号|user|username|login|id/.test(t)) s += 18; if (/密码|pass|验证码|code/.test(t)) s -= 10; return s; }; const fields = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input, textarea')).filter((el) => visible(el) && editable(el)); const target = fields.slice().sort((a, b) => score(b) - score(a))[0] || null; if (!target || score(target) < 1) throw new Error('未识别到账号输入框'); target.focus(); target.value = ''; target.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); target.value = username; target.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); target.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

(() => { const password = String('{{password}}' || '').trim(); if (!password) throw new Error('密码为空'); const visible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 2 && rect.height > 2; }; const editable = (el) => el && !el.disabled && !el.readOnly; const textOf = (el) => [el.placeholder, el.getAttribute('aria-label'), el.name, el.id, el.className].filter(Boolean).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const score = (el) => { let s = 0; const type = String(el.type || '').toLowerCase(); if (type === 'password') s += 24; const t = textOf(el); if (/密码|pass|passwd|pwd/.test(t)) s += 14; if (/账号|用户名|user|username/.test(t)) s -= 8; return s; }; const fields = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input, textarea')).filter((el) => visible(el) && editable(el)); const target = fields.slice().sort((a, b) => score(b) - score(a))[0] || null; if (!target || score(target) < 1) throw new Error('未识别到密码输入框'); target.focus(); target.value = ''; target.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); target.value = password; target.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); target.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return true; })()

steps.description: 识别运营商下拉（检测到则选择，未检测到则跳过）
steps.script: (() => { const isp = String('{{isp}}' || '').trim(); if (!isp) return true; const visible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 1 && rect.height > 1; }; const normalize = (s) => String(s || '').replace(/\s+/g, '').toLowerCase(); const target = normalize(isp); const selects = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('select')).filter(visible); for (const sel of selects) { const options = Array.from(sel.options || []); let best = null; let bestScore = -999; for (const opt of options) { const txt = normalize([opt.textContent, opt.label, opt.value].filter(Boolean).join(' ')); let s = 0; if (txt.includes(target) || target.includes(txt)) s += 30; if (/运营商|isp|carrier|套餐|网络/.test(txt)) s += 6; if (s > bestScore) { bestScore = s; best = opt; } } if (best && bestScore >= 10) { sel.value = best.value; sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return true; } } return true; })()

(() => { const visible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 2 && rect.height > 2; }; const textOf = (el) => String((el.innerText || el.value || el.getAttribute('aria-label') || '')).replace(/\s+/g, '').trim(); const score = (el) => { const t = textOf(el); let s = 0; if (t === '登录' || t === '登入') s += 40; if (/登录|登入|认证|连接网络|上网/.test(t)) s += 18; if (/扫码|二维码|短信|微信|支付宝/.test(t)) s -= 25; if (/重置|取消|退出|返回/.test(t)) s -= 14; return s; }; const nodes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, input[type=submit], input[type=button], a, div[role=button]')).filter(visible); const target = nodes.slice().sort((a, b) => score(b) - score(a))[0] || null; if (!target || score(target) < 8) throw new Error('未找到可用登录按钮'); target.click(); return true; })()

(() => { const urlChanged = window.location.href !== (window.__preLoginUrl || ''); if (urlChanged) return true; const text = String((document.body && document.body.innerText) || '') + ' ' + String(document.title || ''); const t = text.toLowerCase(); const failPhrases = ['密码错误', '密码不正确', '密码有误', '账号错误', '账号不存在', '账号或密码', '用户名或密码', '认证失败', '登录失败', '登入失败', 'login failed', 'authentication failed', 'invalid credentials', 'invalid password']; for (const p of failPhrases) { if (t.includes(p.toLowerCase())) return false; } const okWords = ['登录成功', '认证成功', '已连接', '已上线', '欢迎', 'success', 'connected', 'logout', '退出', '注销']; if (okWords.some((w) => t.includes(w.toLowerCase()))) return true; return false; })()

on_success.message: 案例1执行完成（语义识别）

on_failure.message: 案例1执行失败（语义识别）
